full_text:
Change Notification 
From : Aoife Carroll 
Date: 26-05-21 
Re: Animal -Free Human IL -6 (Catalog ue# AF-200-06) Bioassay 
 
This change notification is to inform all PeproTech customers that a change has been made to one or 
more 
Certificates of Analysis (CoA) or Data Sheets. Please make a note of t his change for all future purchases. 
 
Previously, the Certificate of Analysis (CoA) or Data Sheet stated: 
 
Determined by its ability to stimulate the proliferation of the IL -6 dependent mouse 7TD1 
cells. The expected ED 50 is ≤ 0.1 ng/ml, corresponding to a s pecific activity of ≥ 1 x 107 
units/mg. 
 
The mouse 7TD1 cell line is no longer commercially available. This has been updated to now state: 
 
Determined by its ability to stimulate the proliferation of mouse B9 cells. 
 
This change applies to all future lots. 
Pleas e feel free to contac t me should you have any questions or concerns . 
 
 
 
 
Aoife Carroll 
Technical Services Advisor 
Email: acarr oll@pe protech.co.uk
